==Dragon Horse==
[[File:Dragon Horse.png|100px|left|alt=Dragon Horse]]
Chant to become a Buddha!<br>Gain extra exploration rewards and sutras!

1. Dragon horse can be obtained after completing the [[Journey_to_the_West#Adversities|53rd Adversity]] in [[Journey to the West]] in [[Bharata]].
{{clear}}

===Upgrade Materials===
Upgrading the Dragon Horse requires {{RewardIconWithText|Good Deed}}s. These can be obtained by completing adversities in the [[Journey_to_the_West#Adversities|Journey to the West]].

===Stats===
There are 5 different sutra types each with a corresponding upgrade that increases the amount gained. These sutras can be combined to obtain Cells and Novice Scrolls.

* Terra Sutra
* Garland Sutra
* Heroic March Sutra
* Lotus Sutra
* Diamond Sutra

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level !!Sutra Buff
|-
| 1
| +31%
|-
| 2
| +32%
|-
| 3
| +33%
|-
| 4
| +34%
|-
| 5
| +35%
|-
| 6
| +36%
|-
| 7
| +37%
|-
| 8
| +38%
|-
| 9
| +39%
|-
| 10
| +40%
|-
| 11
| +41%
|-
| 12
| +42%
|-
| 13
| +43%
|-
| 14
| +44%
|-
| 15
| +45%
|-
| 16
| +46%
|-
| 17
| +47%
|-
| 18
| +48%
|-
| 19
| +49%
|-
| 20
| +50%
|-
| 21
| +51%
|-
| 22
| +52%
|-
| 23
| +53%
|-
| 24
| +54%
|-
| 25
| +55%
|-
| 26
| +56%
|-
| 27
| +57%
|-
| 28
| +58%
|-
| 29
| +59%
|-
| 30
| +60%
|}

==Sutra Usage==
Sutras can be chanted for cells and Novice Scrolls by tapping on the Dragon Horse. This will open a window that allows you to chant one of 5 sutra combinations. 

{| class="wikitable"
! Sutras Required (x60) !!Chant Rewards
|-
|{{reimg|Lotus Sutra|35}}Lotus<br>{{reimg|Diamond Sutra|35}}Diamond ||{{reimg|Zombie Cell|35}}Zombie Cell +2000<br>{{reimg|Novice Scroll|35}}Novice Scroll +5
|-
|{{reimg|Diamond Sutra|35}}Diamond<br>{{Reimg|Garland Sutra|35}}Garland||{{reimg|Mecha Cell|35}}Mecha Cell +2000<br>{{reimg|Novice Scroll|35}}Novice Scroll +5
|-
|{{reimg|Terra Sutra|35}}Terra<br>{{Reimg|Garland Sutra|35}}Garland||{{reimg|Mutant Cell|35}}Mutant Cell +2000<br>{{reimg|Novice Scroll|35}}Novice Scroll +5
|-
|{{reimg|Heroic March Sutra|35}}Heroic March<br>{{reimg|Terra Sutra|35}}Terra ||{{reimg|Angel Cell|35}}Angel Cell +2000<br>{{reimg|Novice Scroll|35}}Novice Scroll +5
|-
|{{reimg|Lotus Sutra|35}}Lotus<br>{{reimg|Heroic March Sutra|35}}Heroic March||{{reimg|Demon Cell|35}}Demon Cell +2000<br>{{reimg|Novice Scroll|35}}Novice Scroll +5
|}

==Supreme Warlord Interaction==
[[Supreme Warlord|Lu Bu]] is able to ride the Dragon Horse in order to increase their stats. This costs 1k {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}s and boosts Lu Bu's ATK, DEF, and HP by +5%

==Unsealing==
Once the Dragon Horse has been upgraded to the max level (180), you have the option to Unseal the Spirit trapped inside. Doing this costs 300 {{RewardIconWithLink|Magic Potion}}. Unsealing releases the spirits Raga, Dvesha, and Moha, who will gift {{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest, +100}} and {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +6h}} as a thank you. 

Upgrading Raga, Dvesha, Moha is quite expensive, but doing so gives permanent buffs to your snail. 
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Tier
! rowspan="2" |Potion Cost
! rowspan="2" |B-tads Cost
! colspan="4" |Cumulative effect, or
|-
!HP +
!ATK +
!DEF +
!RUSH +
|-
|T1
|
|
|200
|20
|20
|40
|-
|T2
|100
|4k
|400
|40
|40
|80
|-
|T3
|110
|6k
|600
|60
|60
|120
|-
|T4
|120
|8k
|800
|80
|80
|160
|-
|T5
|130
|10k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |Lotus Sutra Frag Collected +5%<br>Diamond Sutra Frag Collected +5%<br>Garland Sutra Frag Collected +5%<br>Terra Treasure Sutra Frag Collected +5%<br>Heroic March Sutra Frag +5%
|-
|T6
|150
|12k
|1100
|110
|110
|220
|-
|T7
|170
|14k
|1400
|140
|140
|280
|-
|T8
|190
|16k
|1700
|170
|170
|340
|-
|T9
|210
|18k
|2000
|200
|200
|400
|-
|T10
|230
|20k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |All Sutra Frag Collected +10% (Simplified from T5)
|-
|T11
|260
|22k
|2400
|240
|240
|480
|-
|T12
|290
|24k
|2800
|280
|280
|560
|-
|T13
|320
|26k
|3200
|320
|320
|640
|-
|T14
|350
|28k
|3600
|360
|360
|720
|-
|T15
|380
|30k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |All Sutra Frag Collected +15%
|-
|T16
|420
|32k
|4100
|410
|410
|820
|-
|T17
|460
|34k
|4600
|460
|460
|920
|-
|T18
|500
|36k
|5100
|510
|510
|1020
|-
|T19
|540
|38k
|5600
|560
|560
|1120
|-
|T20
|580
|40k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |All Sutra Frag Collected +20%
|-
|T21
|630
|42k
|6200
|620
|620
|1240
|-
|T22
|680
|44k
|6800
|680
|680
|1360
|-
|T23
|730
|46k
|7400
|740
|740
|1480
|-
|T24
|780
|48k
|8000
|800
|800
|1600
|-
|T25
|830
|50k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |All Sutra Frag Collected +25%
|-
|T26
|890
|52k
|8800
|880
|880
|1760
|-
|T27
|950
|54k
|9600
|960
|960
|1920
|-
|T28
|1010
|56k
|10400
|1040
|1040
|2080
|-
|T29
|1070
|58k
|11200
|1120
|1120
|2240
|-
|T30
|1130
|60k
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |All Sutra Frag Collected +30%
|-
|T31
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T32
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T33
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T34
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T35
|
|
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |
|-
|T36
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T37
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T38
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T39
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|T40
|
|
| colspan="4" style="text-align:center" |
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Bharata]]
[[Category:Realm Trait]]
